title: astragalus remanens
intro: Astragalus remanens, also known as Huang Qi, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family, native to China and Mongolia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus remanens include reducing fatigue, improving immune function, and alleviating symptoms of allergies and respiratory issues. Astragalus remanens is often prepared as a decoction, tincture, or capsule, and is typically consumed in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
